name_cn:
CALYPSO Patent Chain Bag
Made from imported Italian patent leather, featuring classic Y-logo, chain, and buckle hardware in matte gold. The flap closes with a magnetic snap for excellent security. Inside, there is a zippered pocket for your phone and valuables; aside from this, there are no other interior pockets, allowing for a free and easy use experience!
Size: 26×14×7cm
Model: 734153
